apply: Students will be able to apply the knowledge of the discovery to understand the context of the novel 'Tutankhamun: The Last Living Pharaoh'.
Students will be able to use the knowledge to make connections between the historical events and the literary work.
Students will be able to identify the themes and motifs in the novel that are related to the discovery.
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the role of Howard Carter in the discovery of the tomb.
Students will be able to evaluate the impact of the discovery on the field of archaeology.
Students will be able to compare the discovery with other significant events in history.
remember: Students will be able to recall the major events in the discovery of Tutankhamun's tomb.
Students will be able to identify the key figures involved in the discovery.
Students will be able to list the significant artifacts found in the tomb.
understand: Students will be able to explain the historical context in which the tomb was discovered.
Students will be able to describe the significance of the discovery in the field of archaeology.
Students will be able to analyze the cultural and social implications of the discovery.

ncert_objectives: As per NCERT objective 1: To understand the historical context of the discovery of Tutankhamun's tomb.
To analyze the significance of the discovery in the field of archaeology.
To evaluate the cultural and social implications of the discovery.
board_exam_objectives: To recall the major events in the discovery of Tutankhamun's tomb.
To identify the key figures involved in the discovery.
To explain the significance of the discovery in the field of archaeology.
